columns.Name: ATTENDANCE_VIOLATION_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key to uniquely identify Attendance Violations

columns.Name: ATTENDANCE_VIOLATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Date on which violation has been raised

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the violation which can have values NEW/FIXED/ACKNOWLEDGED/EXCUSED/PENDING_APPROVAL

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person identifier for which violation is raised

columns.Name: EXCUSED_BY
columns.Comments: Identifier of the manager who has excused the violation

columns.Name: EXCUSED_TIME
columns.Comments: DateTime on which manager has excused the violation

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Remarks added for violation

columns.Name: POINTS
columns.Comments: Penalty point for the violation when threshold is achieved

columns.Name: THRESHOLD_VIOLATED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to check if threshold is violated. Can have values Y/N

columns.Name: THRESHOLD_PERIOD_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Start Date since when we will begin evaluating the threshold

columns.Name: THRESHOLD_PERIOD_STOP_DATE
columns.Comments: Stop Date since when we will begin evaluating the threshold

columns.Name: TIME_ENTRY_ID
columns.Comments: ID to uniquely identify the time entry

columns.Name: TIME_ENTRY_VERSION
columns.Comments: Version of the time entry record

columns.Name: ENTRY_START_TIME
columns.Comments: Start time of time entry or absence

columns.Name: ENTRY_STOP_TIME
columns.Comments: Stop time of time entry or absence

columns.Name: TIME_EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: ID to uniquely identify the time event

columns.Name: ABSENCE_ID
columns.Comments: ID to uniquely identify the absence

columns.Name: ABSENCE_REPORTING_TIME
columns.Comments: DateTime on which the absence is created

columns.Name: SHIFT_ID
columns.Comments: ID to uniquely identify a shift

columns.Name: SHIFT_START_TIME
columns.Comments: Start Time of Shift

columns.Name: SHIFT_STOP_TIME
columns.Comments: Stop Time of Shift

columns.Name: RULE_SET_ID
columns.Comments: Rule Set Identifier

columns.Name: RULE_ID
columns.Comments: Rule Identifier

columns.Name: RULE_TYPE
columns.Comments: The type of rule against which the violation has been raised e.g. Tardy.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
